response:
The quarterly OKR review from Ops indicates Engineering met its 0.7 target with a 0.7 score, Sales and Support both exceeded their 0.7 target with scores of 0.9 and 0.8 respectively, while Product missed its 0.7 target at 0.6 due to a delayed AI feature.
Ops recommends carrying forward the AI OKR with increased allocation, and next quarter’s planning will start on Monday.
